projectDescription: A terminal UI that lets you review your AI coding agent's diffs in real time, leave structured line-level comments, and push feedback back to the agent — all without leaving your terminal.
keyFeatures: Real-time diff viewer with unified and split (side-by-side) views
Line-level and file-level structured comments (issues, suggestions, notes, praise)
Push notifications via MCP channels (Claude Code) for instant feedback delivery
Pull-based feedback queue for all other agents (OpenCode, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI)
Plan & architecture review with markdown rendering and diff between versions
Review gating with /review-plan-wait to block the agent until you approve
Pause flow to stop the agent mid-session while you review
Suggested edits using GitHub-style suggestion blocks
Visual selection for multi-line comments with vim-style visual mode
Session persistence via SQLite with submission history
Mouse support for click, scroll, drag, and modal interactions
publicApiSurface: monocle register [agent] [--global] — Install skills and MCP config for an agent
monocle review status [--json] — Check review status
monocle review get-feedback [--wait] [--json] — Retrieve pending review feedback
monocle review send-artifact --title T [--file F] [--id ID] [--type EXT] [--wait] [--json] — Send content for review
monocle review add-files <paths...> [--json] — Add files to the review session
/get-feedback skill — Agent skill to retrieve pending feedback
/review-plan skill — Agent skill to submit a plan for review
/review-plan-wait skill — Agent skill to submit plan and block until approved
MONOCLE_SOCKET env var — Override the Unix socket path
